---
title: "Anomalies Analysis"
author: "Ben Wasserman"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(ggpubr)
library(colorspace)
library(grid)
library(gdata)
library(str2str)
library(parallel)
library(beepr)
```

```{r functions}
datasubset <- function(x){
  filter(x[[1]], ((Time == 600)&(Rescue == "None")))
}

```

```{r loaddata}
load("./Outputs/Parallel/ITest_2025_03_28_Outputs.Rdata")

```


```{r manipulatedata}
#results_mclapplyall <- unlist(results_mclapply, recursive = FALSE)


#This gets us a 3d array with all of the outputs
DRlistlist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = "[[", 3, mc.cores = 12)
DRlistarray <- lm2a(DRlistlist)

beep(sound = 6)

landlist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = "[[", 2, mc.cores = 12)
landarray <- ld2a(landlist)

landarrayending <- landarray
landarrayending[,1,] <- landarray[,1,]+5

beep(sound = 6)

datalist <- mclapply(results_mclapply, FUN = datasubset, mc.cores = 12)
dataarray <- ld2a(datalist)

beep(sound = 4)

#
#Get the values at the endpoint
poplist <- lapply(datalist, FUN = filter, (Variable == "Pop.Size"))
gradlist <- lapply(datalist, FUN = filter, (Variable == "Grad"))
envlist <- lapply(datalist, FUN = filter, (Variable == "Env"))
gradvarlist <- lapply(datalist, FUN = filter, (Variable == "Grad.Var"))
envvarlist <- lapply(datalist, FUN = filter, (Variable == "Env.Var"))

poparray <- ld2a(poplist)


gradarray <- ld2a(gradlist)
envarray <- ld2a(envlist)
gradvararray <- ld2a(gradvarlist)
envvararray <- ld2a(envvarlist)

Gradmatcharray <- gradarray
Gradmatcharray[,5,] <- as.numeric(Gradmatcharray[,5,]) -landarrayending[,1,]

Envmatcharray <- envarray
Envmatcharray[,5,] <- as.numeric(Envmatcharray[,5,]) - landarrayending[,2,]


Paramdf$Extant <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(poparray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = function(x) {sum(x>0, na.rm = TRUE)})
Paramdf$PopSizeFinal <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(poparray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
Paramdf$Maladapt.Grad <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(Gradmatcharray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
Paramdf$Maladapt.Env <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(Envmatcharray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
Paramdf$GradVar <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(gradvararray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
Paramdf$EnvVar <- apply(matrix(as.numeric(envvararray[,5,]), nrow = 50, byrow = FALSE), MARGIN = 2, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)

Paramsum <- Paramdf %>% dplyr::summarize(across(Extant:EnvVar, .fns = list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE), sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE))), .by = Mig)

```


```{r noneplots}

ggplot(data = Paramdf, aes(x = Mig, y = ))

```
